results.name: the silence
results.description: An alien species that you instantly forget about as soon as they leave your line of sight. They can...sorry, what were we talking about again?

results.name: the speed demon
results.description: A lesser demon appointed by Valgavoth to chaperone Winter in his mission to obtain the Aetherspark. Not to be confused with [the Speed Demons racing team](/tags/artwork/speed-demons).

results.name: the tangle
results.description: A great green expanse of copper structures on Mirrodin.

results.name: the tornado
results.description: Sonic the Hedgehog's biplane, often flown by Tails.

results.name: the ur-dragon
results.description: The interplanar progenitor of all dragonkind.

results.name: the walking dead
results.description: Art set in the Walking Dead universe.

results.name: the wanderer
results.description: The Emperor of Kamigawa. By royal convention, nobody knows her name.

results.name: the wandering minstrel (ffxiv)
results.description: A character in Final Fantasy XIV meant to resemble the head developer, Yoshi P.

results.name: the wilds
results.description: The vast expanse of Eldraine not controlled by the kingdoms, occupied by creatures of fable.

results.name: the world tree
results.description: The World Tree on Kaldheim.

results.name: the yawning portal
results.description: A famous tavern in Waterdeep named after the well at its center, which leads into Undermountain, the mega-dungeon lair of the Mad Mage Halaster.

results.name: thingfall
results.description: Abilities that trigger when something (other than itself) enters the battlefield

results.name: third eye
results.description: Creatures and statues with three eyes

results.name: thompson's unnamed elf
results.description: An elf that Ruth Thompson has drawn on multiple occasions.

results.name: thopter
results.description: Small mechanical flying artifact creatures that inhabit many planes. Shorthand for "Ornithopter"

results.name: thoughtseize
results.description: Opponent reveals their hand, and you choose a card for them to discard.

results.name: threaten
results.description: Gain control of a permanent until end of turn. For continuous theft see [theft-creature](/tags/card/theft-creature).

results.name: three figures
results.description: Depicts a composition with three figures.

results.name: threefold sun symbol
results.description: The symbol of the Threefold Sun, worshipped by the Sun Empire.

results.name: three-headed
results.description: Three heads are better than two!

results.name: three legs
results.description: Creatures with precisely three legs.

results.name: three wise monkeys
results.description: 🙈🙉🙊 Compositions referencing the three wise monkeys: see no evil, hear no evil, speak no evil.

results.name: threshold
results.description: Cards that care about you having seven or more cards in your graveyard.
